name: MFA Financial Inc. 6.50% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: MFA Financial Inc. 6.50% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a series of preferred stock issued by MFA Financial, a real estate investment trust (REIT). The shares pay a fixed dividend that will convert to a floating rate after a certain date. The issuer is MFA Financial.
